documents.label: A copy of the minor's birth certificate
A copy of your birth certificate
A court order
Foster care certification
A copy of your driver's license or other government-issued identification
A lawfully executed and valid power of attorney
A copy of the minor's Social Security card
A copy of your Social Security card

authority.notes: The form lists these under 'To show you are the minor's parent or authorized representative' as OR options (one from this category is sufficient). The minor's birth certificate appears here as proof of parentage, and also under childId as proof of the child's identity — it is the same physical document.

parentId.notes: The form says 'provide one from each category' for the guardian; within the 'For proof of your identity' category the three bullets are OR options.

address.notes: The form does not list a separate proof-of-address document category. The guardian's current address is collected on the form itself but no supporting address document is required.

childId.notes: The form explicitly says 'For the minor, please provide BOTH of the following' — the minor's Social Security card AND the minor's birth certificate are both required.

documents.label: Child's birth certificate
Proof of guardianship, if not named on child's birth certificate
Driver's license or another government issued identification card, such as a state ID card
Child's Social Security card
Proof of address, such as a copy of a bank statement, utility bill, insurance statement

authority.notes: The child's birth certificate serves as proof of authority when the parent is named on it. A separate proof of guardianship is required only if the parent is NOT named on the child's birth certificate — so these two are alternatives covering the same requirement.

childId.notes: The page explicitly lists both 'a copy of your child's birth certificate' and 'a copy of your child's Social Security card' as required items in the 'all of the following' list, making both mandatory for child identity verification.

mailingAddress.notes: The page lists two addresses: standard mail (PO Box 9554) and overnight mail (701 Experian Parkway). The standard mail address is the primary mailing address for this request.

documents.label: A document issued by a Federal, State, or local government agency showing proof of parentage, including a birth certificate
Certified or official copy of a birth certificate issued by the entity authorized to issue the birth certificate (parent)
An order issued by a court of law
Written communication from a county welfare or probation department certifying the protected consumer is in a foster care setting
Copy of a driver's license, an identification card issued by the motor vehicle administration, or any other government issued identification (child)
Copy of a driver's license, an identification card issued by the motor vehicle administration, or any other government issued identification (parent)
A lawfully executed and valid power of attorney
Social Security number or a copy of a Social Security card (child)
Social Security number or a copy of a Social Security card (parent)

authority.notes: The page requires one piece of documentation proving sufficient proof of authority. The birth certificate listed here (proof of parentage) is the same physical document as birth_child, which also satisfies childId.

parentId.notes: TransUnion requires sufficient proof of identification for the parent. Any one of these documents satisfies the requirement. These are listed together with childId documents under a single step 3, but the page makes clear one document per person is needed.

address.notes: TransUnion does not explicitly require a separate proof-of-address document for the Protected Consumer Freeze. Address proof is only mentioned as optional for standard adult freeze requests.

childId.notes: TransUnion requires sufficient proof of identification for the minor. Any one of these documents satisfies the requirement. The birth_child document also appears under authority (proof of parentage) — it is the same physical document referenced in both categories.

mailingAddress.notes: This address is explicitly labeled for the Protected Consumer Freeze (minor/incapacitated adult) on the address-source page (transunion.com/credit-freeze/mail-or-phone). It is distinct from the standard adult freeze address (P.O. Box 160, Woodlyn, PA 19094).
